case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ODEVAR XAVIER DE LIMA JUNIOR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LIMA JUNIOR, ODEVAR XAVIER $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED NOV-20-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE LIMA JUNIOR, ODEVAR XAVIER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-31-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ODEVAR XAVIER DE LIMA JUNIOR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,573.09 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE LIMA JUNIOR, ODEVAR XAVIER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
